events.title: OG Coffee&Code Coding!
events.description: The OG Coffee&Code meetup, in collaboration with the Blockspace Community. No panels/pitches — an open, welcoming space for coders, builders, and designers to work at their own pace, meet other builders, and share ideas. Beginner-friendly and ego-free.

events.title: Composio Saturdays! Let your AI agents orchestrate your many apps in 3 hours!
events.description: A relaxed weekly meetup for developers and AI enthusiasts exploring AI agents and integrations with Composio.dev — the platform that lets AI agents and LLMs interact with real-world tools and workflows. Show & tell, hands-on integration sessions, and community networking.

events.title: Coding on Localhost; Connecting the Community
events.description: A fun, light code session where tech friends get together in a Game Lounge and code. Ask questions, share projects, help each other out, meet other coders. $5.40 tabletop fee for the Retro Lounge space (1-4PM), paid individually at check-in. BYO food/bev (no alcohol).
